user_profile.name: Priya Sharma
user_profile.stated_goal: Save ₹15 lakh in 2 years for a house down payment in Bangalore

commitments.summary: Priya committed to transferring ₹30,000 to her house fund every month, starting November 25, 2025.

acknowledged_patterns.summary: Priya acknowledged she overspends on food delivery — ₹12,890 last month was worse than she expected.

details.observation: Food delivery spend of ₹12,890 in October (10 orders) was higher than Priya realized — more than groceries and fuel combined, at 10.7% of take-home salary.

reminders_set.content: Transfer ₹30,000 to house fund today — your monthly commitment toward the ₹15 lakh down payment goal.
MacBook decision deadline — colleague selling for ₹80,000. Review whether to buy now, negotiate a hold, or wait until January 2026.

session_log.summary: 1 new commitment; 1 new pattern; 1 new reminder
